<?php namespace Spatie\Ignition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\MergeConflictSolutionProvider as BaseMergeConflictSolutionProviderAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; class MergeConflictSolutionProvider extends BaseMergeConflictSolutionProviderAlias implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { }
